title: Torrezx-Better trident
description: Better trident model and texture (requiere OF-EFM)
body:
Torrezx-Better Trident  (OPTIFINE)

ESPAÑOL-Mejora la textura y modelo de el tridente,si estabas cansado de la aburrida

textura del tridente,pues ahora podras disfrutar de esta nueva genial version .

 
English:

Improve the texture and model of the trident, if you were tired of the boring texture of the
 trident, now you can enjoy this great new version
